reviews.review_description: Love aquariums so decided to download this app. It looks great, but I cannot do anything. I cannot move and neither does it show hands or controllers. Does not explain what to do or what can be done since I cannot move. I have Meta 3S. Game may not be compatible with this model as a lot of the games and apps seem to only be compatible with the Occulus and glitches or does not work with Meta model.
